AFFECT [[3197972396468700595]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[10742505294233322867]]
LOCATE BEFORE [[6504167078]]
INSERT {
property ~&6503679477&~ aspectLocked: ~&6504329801&~
}
		TRAVERSE [[12395602925408354507]]#[[214642769434]] 
			LOCATE BEFORE [[425121728314878811.16765000136167945189.7081261925573]]#[[16536305558539690523]]
			INSERT {
				~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
					~&5972374&~: lockAspectRatio
					~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
					~&6504337259&~: ~&214642769434&~.~&6504337259&~
					~&7713561545874130&~: ~&10742505294233322867&~.aspectLocked
					~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"6968812141881670766&~
					~&254542236275632405&~: {
						~&10742505294233322867&~.aspectLocked = !~&10742505294233322867&~.aspectLocked;
					}
				}
			}
		END TRAVERSE
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[3721114421188547763]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[7082725118933]]
REBUILD [[2138791554926729311]]
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM \ ~&7083121450889&~ [~&7083334283753&~, ~&7083373419146&~] \
INSERT {
~&5972376&~(!~&10742505294233322867&~.aspectLocked) {
	~&214622607920&~ originalXDistance = ~&8399749353019900595&~(~&7082453698996&~.~&5972818&~, 0, ~&7082453698996&~.~&5972817&~, 0);
        ~&214622607920&~ currentXDistance = ~&8399749353019900595&~(~&7082453698996&~.~&5972818&~, 0, ~&5972621&~.~&180993&~, 0);
        ~&214622607920&~ scaleX = originalXDistance > 0 ? currentXDistance / originalXDistance : 1.0;
	~&214622607920&~ originalYDistance = ~&8399749353019900595&~(0,~&7082453698996&~.~&5972851&~, 0, ~&7082453698996&~.~&5972850&~);
        ~&214622607920&~ currentYDistance = ~&8399749353019900595&~(0,~&7082453698996&~.~&5972851&~, 0, ~&5972621&~.~&180994&~);
        ~&214622607920&~ scaleY = originalYDistance > 0 ? currentYDistance / originalYDistance : 1.0;
	~&7083334283753&~ = ~&6504283610&~(~&7083334283753&~)*scaleX;
	~&7083373419146&~ = ~&6504283610&~(~&7083373419146&~)*scaleY;
}
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
